changes.before: Not disbelief. Not mockery. A question that assumed the answer might matter.
changes.after: A question that assumed the answer might matter.

changes.before: "I crossed it to confirm it." Irritation sharpened the words. Good. Let them be sharp.
changes.after: "I crossed it to confirm it." Irritation sharpened the words.

changes.before: "The lines are carrying death magic. Deliberate death magic. Not decay, not runoff from a battlefield, not some hedge-wizard poisoning a spring. Someone is using the network of the land itself."
changes.after: "The lines are carrying death magic. Deliberate. Someone is using the network of the land itself."

changes.before: "Broadly, at least. I was not trained in necromancy. No one worth respecting is. But there are signatures common to the forbidden disciplines, and this one is plain. The field folds inward. The current does not dissipate. It clings."
changes.after: "Broadly. I wasn't trained in necromancy. No one worth respecting is. But there are signs common to the forbidden disciplines, and this one is plain. The field folds inward. The current doesn't dissipate. It clings."

changes.before: Too much vocabulary at once. Jaina heard it a heartbeat late and corrected downward before anyone could ask.
changes.after: Too much vocabulary. Jaina caught it a heartbeat late and cut down before anyone could ask.

changes.before: Armed custody still ringed the room, her staff still sat on the rack, and the ward pressing on her magic still made every second feel stolen. But the irritation had changed. Not dismissal. Correction.
changes.after: Armed custody still ringed the room, her staff still sat on the rack, and the ward on her magic made every second feel stolen. But the irritation had changed. Correction.

changes.before: The words sounded worse spoken aloud than they had on the road north. Less urgent. More the sort of youthful arrogance that wore good boots.
changes.after: Spoken aloud, it sounded less urgent and more like youthful arrogance in good boots.

changes.before: Because wrongness moving through the bones of the world did not care what stamp a request form carried.
changes.after: Because wrongness moving through the bones of the world did not care about a stamped request.

changes.before: The Ranger-General watched her long enough that Jaina became aware of her own road-grimed sleeves.
changes.after: Sylvanas watched her long enough that Jaina noticed her own road-grimed sleeves.

changes.before: The crystal at the staff's head tightened at once when it came within reach, familiar and frustrating all at once.
changes.after: The crystal at the staff's head tightened at once when it came within reach, familiar and maddening.

changes.before: Relief came first, hot and humiliating. Dread followed. If the road south proved her wrong, she would deserve every cold look in the room. If it proved her right, then hours had already been lost.
changes.after: Relief came first, hot and humiliating. Then dread. If the road south proved her wrong, she would deserve every cold look in the room. If it proved her right, hours had already been lost.

changes.before: There it was again, humor arriving a heartbeat late and flat enough to cut.
The room changed around the command before Jaina had caught up to it. Rangers peeled away from the walls. Boots sounded on stone. Decision became motion.
changes.after: The room changed around the command. Rangers peeled away from the walls. Boots sounded on stone.

changes.before: Six horses came up from the stable cut into the rock, Thalassian stock bred for distance and steep footing. They tossed their heads while rangers took reins with the ease of old habit. Two women Jaina had not seen inside the holding room mounted first...
changes.after: Six Thalassian horses came up from the stable cut into the rock. Rangers mounted with the ease of old habit. Two women Jaina had not seen in the holding room swung up first...

changes.before: Inside the border grid the ward-hum had lived under everything, too constant to call sound, safety pressed into the land. Annoying at first. Suffocating once she was trapped inside it. Now, beyond the last standing stones, its absence left her abruptly exposed.
changes.after: Inside the border grid the ward-hum had lived under everything, too constant to call sound, safety pressed into the land. Annoying at first. Suffocating once she was trapped inside it. Beyond the last standing stones, its absence left her abruptly exposed.

changes.before: Not from the lines alone. From the ground between them. From seep and root and the shallow run of water under the roadside weeds.
changes.after: It was in more than the lines. Seep and root and the shallow run of water under the roadside weeds.

changes.before: Only then did Jaina realize the silence around her had shape.
changes.after: Silence had shape around her.

changes.before: The misstep came with humiliating clarity. She had heard herself simplifying and had not stopped in time. Three local lines, spoken as if she were addressing a clerk who needed the map drawn in bright chalk.
changes.after: She had simplified again. Three local lines, as if Sylvanas needed bright chalk on the map.

changes.before: "I still can't tell whether the village is source or casualty, only that the pressure gathers around it."
changes.after: "I can't yet tell whether the village is source or casualty, only that the pressure gathers around it."

changes.before: The farther south they rode, the more the country looked interrupted rather than abandoned... The next place was worse... Grain bent in the field behind the house in odd patchwork...
changes.after: The farther south they rode, the more the country looked interrupted... The next place was worse... Grain bent in the field behind the house in ugly patchwork...

changes.before: Jaina wished, abruptly and fiercely, that Antonidas were here. Not for rescue. For confirmation. For one of his maddeningly patient looks that meant yes, you are seeing it correctly, now go one step farther. She had left him a note and ridden north believing brilliance could stand in for witness. On the open road, with cold hearths watching from the fields, the choice seemed lonelier than it had at dawn.
changes.after: Jaina wished, abruptly and fiercely, that Antonidas were here. Not to rescue her. To confirm she was seeing this right and force her one step farther. She had ridden north believing brilliance could stand in for witness; on this road the choice felt lonelier than it had at dawn.

changes.before: For one disbelieving instant Jaina thought sick. Then the first animal saw the horses and charged straight at them.
changes.after: Sick, Jaina thought. Then the first animal saw the horses and charged straight at them.

changes.before: Not heartbeat. Wronger. A hot, stuttering push inside the body where life should already have been giving way.
changes.after: No heartbeat. A hot, stuttering push inside the body where life should already have been giving way.

changes.before: The wolves mattered less now. One had died in the road. One thrashed once more in the ditch and did not rise. The third dragged itself into the grass on a broken hind leg, leaving a red smear. Lyriel dismounted to finish it without ceremony. Neral soothed the horses in a low stream of Thalassian.
changes.after: One wolf had died in the road. One thrashed once more in the ditch and stilled. The third dragged itself into the grass on a broken hind leg, leaving a red smear. Lyriel went after it without ceremony. Neral soothed the horses in a low stream of Thalassian.

changes.before: Heat, yes, but wrong heat, trapped in flesh that had stopped serving life cleanly long before death. The same pressure she had found in the soil and water, only stronger here, answered through the body itself. Necromantic current threaded through the animal not as an afterthought laid on a corpse, but as magic already active before the body had finished dying.
changes.after: Wrong heat trapped in flesh that had stopped serving life cleanly long before death. The same pressure she had found in soil and water answered through the body itself. Necromantic current threaded through the animal while it was still dying.

changes.before: "The contamination isn't merely killing what touches it. It's teaching living flesh to answer it before death finishes... We are past strange disturbance."
changes.after: "It gets into living flesh before death finishes... Ground and water are carrying it. Animals drink it. Eat it. Carry it in blood and organs. This is in the blood now."

changes.before: Silence followed. Not blank silence. The kind that meant each of them was already measuring what the answer changed.
changes.after: Silence followed. Each of them was already measuring what the answer changed.

changes.before: Jaina looked down at the blood drying dark in the lines of her hand. At the deer's half-open eye filmed over in death and the worse thing that had almost kept it from being death at all.
changes.after: Jaina looked at the blood drying dark in her palm and at the deer's half-open eye filmed over in death.

changes.before: The road narrowed between fields gone ragged with neglect. Evening lowered itself over the countryside in a bruised wash of violet and iron. Birds had gone quiet. No farm dogs barked as they passed. No smoke rose anywhere... From this distance it might have been peaceful, a poor settlement settling into evening. Then the details sharpened.
changes.after: The road narrowed between fields gone ragged with neglect. Evening bruised the countryside violet and iron. No birdsong. No farm dogs. No smoke... Roofs dark against the failing light, clustered around a narrow lane and the black cut of the stream.

flags: Line 27: 'Like a struck string answering a note' kept — load-bearing magical simile in Jaina's voice.
Line 251: 'as if Sylvanas needed bright chalk on the map' kept — humiliation beat from Jaina, not document voice.
World terms 'leylines,' 'ward-stones,' 'Antonidas,' and 'Millhaven' kept — canon-specific, not bureaucratic register.

huntObservations.name: wordcount reduction
observations: Line 21 dropped the disbelief/mockery scaffold and opened on the judgment that matters.
Line 31 lost the self-approval beat after Jaina snaps back; the irritation already reads in the line.
Lines 37-45 were cut down to the usable diagnosis and one intentional over-technical slip.
Line 57 lost one repeated 'still' chain and the extra dismissal restatement.
Lines 83-101 trimmed the admission aftermath so shame stays in Jaina instead of narrator gloss.
Lines 149-165 lost a redundant motion-summary and tightened the staff handoff beat.
Lines 181-203 compressed horse rollout and border release without dropping any ranger introductions or tactical information.
Lines 281-305 cut duplicate empty-farm dread and shortened the Antonidas reflection while preserving her need for witness.
Lines 377-403 compressed the post-fight cleanup and carcass read; the horror now lands faster.
Lines 421-437 stripped reassurance meta-language before the village reveal.
Three densest stretches were reread word by word after cuts: the holding-room interrogation, the roadside reading, and the deer diagnosis.
Word count fell 4744 -> 4087 without changing scene order, beats, or chapter handoff.

huntObservations.name: hitlist patterns
observations: Sentence-initial Not scaffolds fell 11 -> 3.
Ranger-General title drumbeat fell 20 -> 1 once Jaina had clearly identified Sylvanas.
The clearest report-voice patch at lines 41-45 was forced back into Jaina's spoken cadence.
Line 229 replaced a realize-summary with direct field geometry: who covers which side of the road.
Line 259 cut the editorial phrase 'humiliating clarity' and left the embarrassment in the image itself.
Line 303 stopped narrating Antonidas as an explanatory device and kept him as the person who would confirm she was right.
Line 347 replaced 'Wronger' with the actual physical anomaly in the body.
Line 385 grounded the corpse read in flesh, heat, and current instead of memo-sounding summary.
Line 399 turned the explanation into field words: drink, eat, blood.
The final Millhaven approach now uses one emptiness pass instead of repeating the same silence twice.
The phrase 'strange disturbance' was removed entirely.
No planning vocabulary, elegant variation, clinical anatomy, or modern tech jargon survived this pass.

huntObservations.name: dialogue register hunt
observations: Every quoted line in v5 was rescanned against Dialogue Register Contamination and the Jaina/Sylvanas voice sheets.
Sylvanas's lines stayed clipped, rank-secure, and deadpan; no bureaucratic or clinical memo language slipped in.
Jaina's early explanation keeps one deliberate over-technical flare, but now she downshifts faster when checked.
'That is almost reassuring' stayed — dry Sylvanas pressure, not institutional speech.
'Your bedside manner is remarkable' stayed — Jaina stress wit, not modern snark.
Cyndia, Lyriel, and Neral all stay in field shorthand; no one starts sounding like a report writer.
No dialogue use of actionable, vector, optimal, propagation, diagnostic, substrate, or similar hitlist offenders was found.
The three remaining sentence-initial Not/No beats are spoken clarifications or interior emphasis, not narrator scaffolding.
Canon terms like leylines and ward-stones were checked individually and kept as world-native vocabulary.
